section1_buyback_no_older: We buy electronics no older than 5 years:
section2_buyback_price: The final buyout price is set after inspecting the item and evaluating its technical condition. Be sure to have an identity document with you.
section2_buyback_stolen_goods: We DO NOT BUY stolen goods or items sold by minors.
section2_buyback_large_quantities: For large quantities of buyback, please contact us by email: <1>info@kompservisas.lt<1/>.
